_README: TEMPLATE — merge the entries you want into your project .mcp.json (or run `claude mcp add`). Do NOT paste verbatim: every command/url/env-var name below is a PLACEHOLDER to verify against each vendor's current MCP docs. API keys belong in your shell environment, never in this file. Transports: 'stdio' = local process; 'http'/'sse' = remote (sign-in on first connect). This file is intentionally NOT the live .mcp.json so it cannot disrupt this repo's own servers (umbriel/diffgate/memex).

granola._note: Meeting notes fed to Claude. Already connected in some environments. Verify the official package/endpoint.

slack._note: Reads channels, posts updates. Remote hosted MCP — confirm Slack's endpoint URL; sign-in on first connect.

notion._note: Reads/writes your docs. Notion ships a hosted MCP — confirm current URL; sign-in on first connect.

kondo._note: Triages LinkedIn DMs. Confirm whether stdio package or hosted endpoint.

zapier._note: 9,000+ apps via one connection. Zapier gives a per-account hosted URL — generate it in Zapier and paste here.

higgsfield._note: Cinematic video from a prompt. Confirm package. Set the env var HIGGSFIELD_API_KEY in your shell before launch (do not inline it here).

perplexity._note: Live web search for Claude. Confirm package. Set the env var PERPLEXITY_API_KEY in your shell before launch (do not inline it here).

agent-browser._note: Token-light browser automation. Confirm package; may need a local browser binary.
